component.name: FlaskConsoleOptions

option.name: myCustomStartScript

project.component: { "keyToString": { "JavaScript 调试.index.html (1).executor": "Run", "JavaScript 调试.index.html.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Python.app.executor": "Run", "Python.dashboard.executor": "Run", "Python.security_detect.executor": "Run", "Python.start_dashboard.executor": "Run", "Python.tasks.executor": "Run", "Python.test - 副本.executor": "Run", "Python.test.executor": "Run", "Python.test2 (1).executor": "Run", "Python.test2.executor": "Run", "Python.yolov8_security.executor": "Run", "Python.yolov8_security_fixed.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "deletionFromPopupRequiresConfirmation": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "javascript.preferred.runtime.type.id": "node", "last_opened_file_path": "D:/yolov8_security", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "com.jetbrains.python.configuration.PyActiveSdkModuleConfigurable", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
